How to Stake
Step-by-Step Staking Guide

A Clear 6-Step Guide to Mastering PROPS Token Staking, effortlessly navigate from wallet connection to reward redemption, making your journey into the Propbase staking both seamless and rewarding.

STEP 01
Connect Your Wallet

Begin by connecting your Aptos Blockchain wallet to the staking platform. This wallet will be used to hold your claim staked tokens and receive rewards. Ensure you are using a supported wallet Pontem, Petra, or Martian Wallets.

STEP 02
Choose Staking Options

Explore the available staking options provided by the platform. This may include different staking durations, reward rates, or other parameters. Assess the risk and rewards associated with each option to make an informed decision.

STEP 03
Input Stake Amount

Decide the amount of PROPS tokens you want to stake. This can vary based on your risk tolerance and investment goals. Once you've chosen your staking amount, initiate the staking process through the platform by confirming the transaction.

STEP 04
Monitor your rewards

Keep track of your staked assets and monitor any changes in rewards. Most staking platforms provide dashboards where you can view your staking status, including current stakes, earned rewards, and other relevant information.

STEP 05
Earn rewards for staking

As your PROPS tokens are staked, you'll start earning rewards over time. These rewards are typically a percentage of your staked amount and are distributed periodically. Be aware of the staking duration and the frequency of payouts.

STEP 06
Claim your Rewards

When you're ready to claim your staking rewards, navigate to the platform's interface and the option to claim rewards. Follow the necessary steps to initiate the reward withdrawal process, and the earned tokens will be deposited into your connected wallet.

Discover PROPS (About PROPS) : Your Pathway to Advanced Transactions and Utility:

PROPS serves as the foundation of our cutting-edge real estate platform, providing users with a multifaceted tool for property transactions and community engagement. As a token native to the Aptos Blockchain, it capitalizes on the unique features of our blockchain infrastructure, ensuring smooth compatibility with a wide array of wallets, exchanges, and blockchain-driven services. Throughout historical trends, PROPS has demonstrated substantial growth, outpacing the general performance of the global cryptocurrency market.

PROPS (Propbase) Token Contract Address:

0xe50684a338db732d8fb8a3ac71c4b8633878bd0193bca5de2ebc852a83b35099::propbase_coin::PROPS

PROPS Utilities:

Staking
Transactions
Governance
Membership
Platform Fees
Rewards

How & Where to buy PROPS?

Step 1: Setup Aptos Blockchain Wallet:

Create and set up your Aptos Blockchain Wallet, ensuring to keep your seed phrase secure for account recovery.

01

Step 2: Add PROPS Token Contract:

Enter the PROPS token contract address from above and add it to your wallet to facilitate transactions with the PROPS token.

02

Step 3: Securely Purchase PROPS on DEX or CEX:

Choose a decentralized exchange (DEX) or centralized exchange (CEX) of your preference to securely buy PROPS, ensuring a reliable platform for your transactions.

03
Buy PROPS on:
MEXC
Pancake
Liquidswap
Chainge Finance
Bitget

Security Measures and Trust Assurance in
Propbase Staking:

Propbase Staking Security Measures:

  • Asset Protection: Robust security protocols in place for safeguarding user assets.
  • Encryption: Utilization of encryption enhanced security.
  • Privacy Assurance: Commitment to maintaining user data confidentiality and privacy

Our Assurance:

  • Audit Assurance: PROPS audit results, Mention periodic security audits and assessments (if any)
  • Website Infra: Built on a robust infrastructure, our platform seamlessly supports high staking volumes.
  • Team Assurance: The experienced team behind Propbase ensures effective and efficient system maintenance, ensuring seamless operation without disruptions.

Audits & Compliance

Our Partners :

FAQFrequently Asked Questions

Join the community and get involved today! For more information related to partnerships and
business related inquiries please contatct us through info@propbase.app

Investors will have the opportunity to stake their PROPS and receive rewards in PROPS.

The Propbase real estate tokenization platform is anticipated to launch in late Q1 2024.

PROPS is currently available to purchase on MEXC, Pancake, LiquidSwap and Bitget exchanges.

Absolutely, there's exciting news on the horizon! PROPS is gearing up for listings on additional exchanges in the near future. Stay tuned for more updates!

PROPS is the native utility currency of the Propbase platforms and it serves as the primary medium for transactions and rewards within the Propbase Platform. It acts as the core currency utilized for various functions and rewards for users across the platform.

Firstly, ensure you have PROPS tokens in your possession. If you don't have any PROPS, you can obtain them through a DEX. Once you have obtained PROPS, head over to the Stake Menu on our platform. From there, select your preferred Stake product and input the amount of PROPS you intend to stake. Proceed by approving the amount and finally submit the stake transaction. We've streamlined this process to make it as user-friendly as possible. If you need any assistance or have suggestions, don't hesitate to reach out to us. We're here to assist you with any queries or feedback you may have.

The rewards in Propbase staking are calculated based on the number of tokens staked, the staking duration, and the annual percentage yield (APY) of the selected staking plan. The system employs a simple interest calculation method to determine the rewards. Rewards = P*N*R/100 (Where P: Principle, N: Staking duration in years, R: Rate of interest).

The minimum staking amount might vary for each staking product. Please refer to the specific stake product details to determine the minimum staking requirement.

Certainly, users have the flexibility to unstake their staked PROPS at any time during the staking duration. However, certain stake products might impose penalties for early withdrawals. Please review the terms and conditions of your chosen staking plan for details on early unstaking penalties.

Users are required to manually claim their rewards from the Portfolio section. You can claim rewards at any time at intervals minimum 24 hours. Rewards are distributed based on the investment you made and for how long. Rewards are calculated based on the simple interest formula on the APY% given for a pool. Upon claiming, the tokens will be credited to the user's connected wallets.

Unclaimed staking rewards accumulate over time. If there is a minimum of 2 years of inactivity, the admin reserves the right to claim them back. However, it is recommended to claim rewards regularly in accordance with the mentioned vesting schedule displayed in your portfolio.

Like all crypto transactions, staking carries inherent market risks that might result in the potential loss of staked tokens due to market fluctuations. It's crucial to perform comprehensive research before opting for staking and to thoroughly understand the risks associated with the selected staking plan.

Staking protocols prioritize the security of users's assets through multiple protective measures, including encryption, smart contracts, and audited protocols. Utilizing blockchain technology, security is reinforced by its inherent characteristics such as decentralized validation, cryptography, and immutable records, preventing unauthorized data changes. Additionally, our platform underwent a thorough audit conducted by Certik, a respected and one of the best security auditing firm. Their comprehensive analysis awarded us with an excellent score, indicating a robust security level. Additionally, the contract underwent thorough testing, achieving an extensive 95% of test coverage, ensuring a high level of reliability.

If you encounter any issues while staking, reach out to our support team through the provided support form . Our team will assist you in resolving any staking-related queries or issues you may have.

A pool can be stopped by declaring an emergency in the contract by the admin. Then all the invested capital and rewards so far will be returned to all the users wallet address.

You may not be able to unstake within the first 24 hours of first staking. After which you can stake and unstake at any time.

No, you may not be able to stake when there is only 24 hours left in the pool duration.
